sections.paragraph:
m. a doubling. Job 41:5, כֶּפֶל דִסְנֹו “the doubling of his jaws,” i.e. his jaw armed with a double row of teeth.

Dual-

(1) pr. two folds, foldings. Job 11:6, כִּי כִפְלַיִם לְתוּשִׁיָּה “for God’s wisdom has double folds,” i.e. the wisdom of God is complicated, inexplicable. According to others, double, i.e. manifold, infinite, is the wisdom of God.

(2) double, Isa 40:2.
